description:
Specialized 3D scanning and post-processing software for Trackit 3D scanners.

Revo Track enables point cloud capture, post-processing, and multi-model alignment, empowering you to scan and process quickly.
1. Adds a standalone scanner mode, supporting direct scanning by connecting the Scanner with a dedicated cable.
2. Adds color texturing in marker mode.
3. Adds vibration detection for tracked scanning, monitoring Tracker vibration in real time to ensure scanning accuracy.
4. Fixes lag issues after long scanning sessions.
5. Optimizes rendering for multi-position scans.
6. Improves laser line scanning performance in CPU mode to enhance the user experience.
7. Adds color texturing to One-Click Processing.
8. Optimizes M-key menu switching (short-press M to enter or toggle settings).
9. Adds automatic exposure for the depth camera in laser line scanning modes.
10. Adds support for Large Turntable control.
11. Adds shortcut key settings and documentation.
12. Optimizes overall user experience.
13. Fixes some bugs.
